description:
You are a database developer adding an invoicing system to the OrientDB DemoDB travel agency database. Connect to the 'demodb' database (Server: root / GymAnything123!, Database: admin / admin). Create an ORDERED sequence 'invoiceIdSeq' (start 1000, increment 1) and a CACHED sequence 'receiptSeq' (start 5000, increment 1, cache 10). Define a vertex class 'Invoices' extending V with properties: InvoiceId (INTEGER), CustomerEmail (STRING), Amount (DOUBLE), Currency (STRING), IssuedDate (DATE), Description (STRING), and Status (STRING). Apply a UNIQUE index to Invoices.InvoiceId. Insert five invoice records in the order provided below, using sequence('invoiceIdSeq').next() for the InvoiceId:

Record 1: CustomerEmail='john.smith@example.com', Amount=450.00, Currency='EUR', IssuedDate='2024-01-15', Description='Hotel Artemide - 3 nights', Status='paid'
Record 2: CustomerEmail='maria.garcia@example.com', Amount=1250.00, Currency='EUR', IssuedDate='2024-01-22', Description='Hotel de Crillon - 2 nights', Status='paid'
Record 3: CustomerEmail='david.jones@example.com', Amount=875.50, Currency='GBP', IssuedDate='2024-02-03', Description='The Savoy - 1 night', Status='pending'
Record 4: CustomerEmail='sophie.martin@example.com', Amount=2100.00, Currency='USD', IssuedDate='2024-02-14', Description='The Plaza Hotel - 2 nights', Status='paid'
Record 5: CustomerEmail='luca.rossi@example.com', Amount=580.00, Currency='EUR', IssuedDate='2024-02-28', Description='Hotel Artemide - 4 nights', Status='overdue'
